hero.subtitle: Draft, negotiate, sign, and manage contracts with AI that runs on your terms. Self-host for complete data sovereignty, or let us handle it.

features.heading: Everything you need to manage contracts
features.subtitle: From first draft to final signature — and every obligation that follows.
features.i0desc: Generate contracts in seconds. Use local models, bring your own API keys, or use our hosted AI — your data, your choice.
features.i1desc: Pre-built templates for NDAs, SaaS agreements, employment contracts, and more. Customize with smart variables.
features.i2desc: Send for signing, track status, collect executed copies. A complete signing workflow without third-party costs.
features.i3desc: Never miss a renewal, milestone, or compliance date. Automated alerts keep your team ahead of every deadline.
features.i4desc: Real-time dashboards for contract value, cycle time, risk exposure, and team productivity.
features.i5desc: Full Arabic, French, German, and Spanish support with native RTL layout. Draft contracts in any language.

dd.0desc: Specialized AI agents for drafting, review, risk analysis, and extraction — powered by models you control. Connect local LLMs or bring your own API keys. No data leaves your infrastructure unless you choose.
dd.1title: From draft to signed in minutes
dd.1desc: A rich contract editor with real-time collaboration, clause suggestions, smart variables, and approval workflows. Send for e-signature when ready — no switching tools.
dd.2desc: Track every contract's lifecycle stage, value, risk score, and upcoming obligations. Exportable reports and customizable dashboards give your team the insights they need.

os.heading: Your contracts. Your infrastructure.
os.subtitle: Aaked is fully open source under the AGPL License. Deploy on your own servers for complete data sovereignty — no vendor lock-in, no per-seat pricing, no compromises.
os.0desc: Docker, Kubernetes, or bare metal. Run Aaked wherever your compliance team needs it. One command to deploy.
os.1desc: Connect local LLMs, use OpenAI, Anthropic, or any provider. Your API keys, your models — no data leaves your network.
os.2desc: Built by developers and legal teams worldwide. Every feature request, bug fix, and improvement is transparent.

integrations.heading: Connects to the tools you already use

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.a0: Yes. Aaked is open source under the AGPL License. You can self-host it at no cost with unlimited users, contracts, and features. We also offer a free hosted version for teams who don't want to manage infrastructure.
faq.a1: Deploy with a single Docker command or use our Kubernetes Helm chart. We provide detailed documentation, migration scripts, and community support. Your data never touches our servers.
faq.q2: Can I use my own AI models?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Aaked supports local LLMs (via Ollama, vLLM, etc.), OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, and any OpenAI-compatible API. Bring your own API keys — we never proxy your AI requests.
faq.q3: Is Aaked suitable for enterprise use?
faq.a3: Yes. Aaked includes SSO/SAML, role-based access control, audit logging, SOC 2 readiness, and GDPR compliance tools. Many teams in regulated industries use Aaked in production.
faq.q4: How do I migrate from DocuSign or other tools?
faq.a4: We provide import tools for DocuSign, PandaDoc, and CSV-based migration. Our team can assist with complex migrations during the early access period.
faq.a5: The interface supports English, Arabic (with full RTL), French, German, and Spanish. You can draft contracts in any language, and the AI features work across all supported languages.

cta.heading: Ready to take control of your contracts?
cta.subtitle: Get early access to the hosted version, or clone the repo and deploy on your own infrastructure today.

footer.tagline: The contract platform. Open source, AI-powered, and built for teams that care about data sovereignty.
